description: Jotform is an online form-building and data-collection platform for creating forms, collecting submissions, and managing related workflows. It also offers AI-oriented MCP access to forms and submissions through compatible clients.
summary: Jotform exposes a REST API authenticated by account API keys, plus hosted MCP endpoints at `https://mcp.jotform.com` and `https://mcp.jotform.com/mcp-app` that require per-user OAuth via the Jotform MCP app.
